metadata.description: Sabha OS — a local-first AI council protocol for Claude. In the Chanakya tradition: decisive, tradeoff-aware, grounded.

plugins.name: sabha-os
plugins.description: A local-first AI council protocol for Claude. Every substantive question is classified into a role (CIO, CAIO, CFO, CMO, CSO, CXO, CHRO, CEO) and answered in the Chanakya tradition — terse, decisive, recommendation-first. Pairs with a local memory MCP to build your Sakthi: an accumulated, locally-owned memory of every decision, person, and project. Deep skills shipped for CFO and CMO (frameworks from Kahneman, Christensen, Porter, McKinsey, Skok, and others). Live-data hooks documented for Stripe, QuickBooks, and Google Analytics.

plugins.name: sakthi-graph
plugins.description: Sakthi — your power, your memory, your machine. A local-first AI knowledge graph for the Sabha OS council. Forked from MemPalace (MIT) and extended with Sabha-specific presets: 9 role wings (CFO, CMO, CIO, CAIO, CSO, CXO, CHRO, CLC, CEO) pre-created on `sakthi init --sabha`, role-aware diary templates, and a Sakthi-branded MCP tool surface (sakthi_search, sakthi_kg_query, sakthi_diary_write, etc.). Requires the Python package: `uv tool install sakthi-graph` (or pip).
